title: The Hong Duc Code
summary: The extremely progressive legal code of King Le Thanh Tong, protecting the rights of the people and emphasizing education.

slides.text: Did you know? During the Le Dynasty, there was an extremely talented king named Le Thanh Tong. He ordered the drafting of a very famous collection of laws: The Hong Duc Code.
slides.imagePrompt: King Le Thanh Tong with his scholars, holding a large thick book titled 'LUAT HONG DUC', gold and red colors, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: This was a very fair set of laws. It not only protected the King but also the rights of all people, especially women and the poor!
slides.imagePrompt: An official reading a decree to a diverse group of happy villagers, including women and elderly, atmosphere of fairness, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: The Hong Duc Code clearly regulated the protection of land, the preservation of good customs, and encouraged everyone to study hard and practice morality.
slides.imagePrompt: Students studying in a sunny courtyard, a teacher pointing to the sky, a well-managed village scene, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Thanks to this code, our country became very orderly and stable. It is considered one of the greatest legal works of ancient Vietnam.
slides.imagePrompt: A large ancient library or archive with scrolls, sunlight streaming through windows, a feeling of wisdom and order, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: The Hong Duc Code was named after the era name of which King?
What made the Hong Duc Code very progressive at that time?
options: It was only for the King
It protected the rights of many people, including women
It forced everyone to join the army
slides.answer: It protected the rights of many people, including women
